---
description: Propose a new change - create it and generate all artifacts in one step
---

## Alias of **`/skillgrid-plan`** (Part B — OpenSpec CLI)

Open and follow **[`skillgrid-plan.md`](./skillgrid-plan.md)**. It includes the PRD (**Part A**) and the **`openspec new change` → `openspec status --json` → `openspec instructions` loop** (**Part B**).

When the user only wants a quick change scaffold without a full PRD pass, still use **`/skillgrid-plan`** so PRD numbering and hybrid bookkeeping stay consistent.

## Completion report (required)

Use the **Completion report** at the end of **`/skillgrid-plan`**: what you did, token usage if the product shows it (else **`Token usage: not shown in this environment`**), and suggested next (**typically `/skillgrid-breakdown`**).
